caribbean.headline: Caribbean Conditions: Martinique
caribbean.paragraph: Martinique in the Lesser Antilles is the highest-impact location in the Caribbean this period, with winds peaking at 14 kt and seas building to 3.1 ft with SE swell at 5s periods. 100% rain probability -- expect disrupted conditions for shore excursions and tender operations.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Conditions: Mykonos
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos in the Eastern Mediterranean is the highest-impact location in the Mediterranean this period, with winds peaking at 21 kt and seas building to 3.5 ft with NE swell at 5s periods. 38% rain probability -- isolated showers possible but conditions remain manageable.
